title: Plague Garden
author: josh-reynolds
description: Lord-Castellant Gardus Steel Soul leads a Stormcast Eternal chamber into the Garden of Nurgle itself, plunging into the heart of the Realm of Death to rescue a captured comrade. What they find in that festering paradise will test the limits of even immortal warriors.

title: Soul Wars
author: josh-reynolds
description: A new era dawns for the Mortal Realms as Nagash unleashes the Necroquake — a cataclysmic wave of death magic that reshapes reality. The Stormcast Eternals must face a resurgent undead threat unlike any before, while the God of Death pursues his grand design to claim every soul in existence.

title: Black Pyramid
author: josh-reynolds
description: The aftermath of the Soul Wars. A Stormcast Eternal warband ventures into Shyish in search of a mysterious black pyramid that may hold the key to understanding Nagash's plan — and the cost of standing against the supreme lord of undeath.

title: Hamilcar: Champion of the Gods
author: david-guymer
description: Hamilcar Bear-Eater is the most boastful, swaggering, and gloriously over-confident Stormcast Eternal ever to stride the Mortal Realms. His stories of heroism — told in his own inimitable style — conceal a warrior of genuine brilliance and a champion blessed by Sigmar himself.

title: Blacktalon: First Mark
author: andy-clark
description: Neave Blacktalon is Sigmar's assassin — a Stormcast Eternal of the Knight-Zephyros, chosen to hunt and destroy the champions of Chaos across the Mortal Realms. Her first mark leads her into a conspiracy that goes deeper than any single target, and the prey may be more dangerous than even she anticipates.
